feed.title: Poem on SnailShell
feed.description: Recent content in Poem on SnailShell

entry.title: A Myopic Man’s Shower in Daylight
entry.summary: The sun with a photon takes a shot at me It runs across the atmosphere Evading dust and wings of birds It penetrates the double-paned window And ricochets off crystals falling in threads Getting lost on the lenses steamed opaque I take them off, trading fog for a blur Bare-eyed, I’m still bulletproof.
entry.content:
The sun with a photon takes a shot at me
It runs across the atmosphere
Evading dust and wings of birds
It penetrates the double-paned window
And ricochets off crystals falling in threads
Getting lost on the lenses steamed opaque
I take them off, trading fog for a blur
Bare-eyed, I’m still bulletproof.
